_comment: Field map for FNMA Form 1004 URAR - Single Family Residential.
_phase: Phase 1 hardening baseline plus corpus-backed surface profiling. A March 13, 2026 audit confirmed the Sales/Reco group still has live navigation reliability gaps even though earlier calibration data existed.
_calibration_note: TX32 fields do not use UIA automation_ids. Neighborhood, Site, and Improvements paths still have live support. Sales, Reconciliation, Offering History, and Contract Analysis now rely on corpus-backed surface hints until owner-drawn tab navigation is deterministic.
_calibration: HOW TO CALIBRATE: 1) Open ACI with a 1004 report loaded. 2) Start desktop_agent/agent.py. 3) Run: python desktop_agent/calibrate_aci.py. 4) Re-run: python _test_aci_live.py 1004 to confirm live placement and read-back for each target field.

_schema.label: Human-readable field label - used for label-proximity TX32 matching
_schema.aliases: Alternative label texts to try if primary label does not match
_schema.tab_name: Partial tab name to click before targeting (e.g. 'Neig' matches 'Neighborhood' tab)
_schema.automation_id: UIA AutomationId - fill from /calibrate output if available
_schema.class_name: Windows class name for RichEdit controls - fill from /calibrate if available
_schema.class_index: 0-based index among controls of this class_name
_schema.control_index: 0-based index among ALL text-input controls - last resort fallback
_schema.expected_classes: Expected Windows control classes for this field - used for validation
_schema.verification_mode: How to verify insertion: tx32_readback | uia_get_value | skip
_schema.report_click_ratio: Optional [x,y] ratio inside ACIFormView used to activate the visible report box before TX32 targeting
_schema.report_click_delay_ms: Optional delay after a report-surface click before re-discovering TX32 controls

neighborhood_description.label: Neighborhood Description
neighborhood_description.notes: Primary narrative field on Neighborhood tab. TX32 content area. No label title strip found - uses aci_full_addendum_view fallback.

market_conditions.label: Market Conditions Comments
market_conditions.notes: Market conditions narrative on Neighborhood tab. Earlier live placement is still credible, and the PDF corpus confirms the same page cluster as neighborhood description.

site_comments.label: Site Comments
site_comments.notes: Site section narrative. Tab partial: 'Site'. PDF corpus anchors this section to the page 3/4 neighborhood-site block.

improvements_condition.label: Improvements Comments
improvements_condition.notes: Improvements and condition narrative on the Improvements tab. PDF corpus anchors this section to the same page 3/4 block as the physical condition questions.

sales_comparison_commentary.label: Sales Comparison Comments
sales_comparison_commentary.notes: Sales comparison narrative. Earlier label matching exists, but March 13, 2026 live testing showed owner-drawn tab navigation could land on the wrong visible section. A March 16, 2026 live anchor on the sales page summary box reliably opened the 'Comments on Sales Comparison' editor.

reconciliation.label: Reconciliation Comments
reconciliation.notes: Reconciliation narrative. Earlier label matching exists, but March 13, 2026 live testing showed owner-drawn tab navigation could land on the wrong visible section. Use corpus-backed surface hints until visual navigation is deterministic.

cost_approach.label: Cost Approach Comments
cost_approach.notes: Cost approach narrative. PDF corpus anchors this section to the page 5/6 cost-income block.

income_approach.label: Income Approach Comments
income_approach.notes: Income approach narrative. PDF corpus anchors this section to the page 5/6 cost-income block.

offering_history.label: Offering History
offering_history.notes: Offering and prior sale history narrative. Earlier label matching exists, but March 13, 2026 live testing showed wrong-box risk when Sales tab navigation was not deterministic.

contract_analysis.label: Contract Analysis
contract_analysis.notes: Contract analysis narrative. Earlier label matching exists, but March 13, 2026 live testing showed wrong-box risk when Sales tab navigation was not deterministic.

functional_utility.label: Functional Utility
functional_utility.notes: Functional utility or obsolescence narrative. PDF corpus anchors this section to the page 3/4 improvements block.

adverse_conditions.label: Adverse Conditions
adverse_conditions.notes: Adverse conditions or external factors narrative. PDF corpus anchors this section to the page 3/4 site-improvements block.
